message:
feat(polyfills): add Phase 14 Node.js compat - timers, crypto, AbortSignal

- Timers: Timeout/Immediate classes with ref/unref/hasRef/refresh methods
- net: maxConnections enforcement with 'drop' event, remoteFamily/localFamily
- http: writeContinue/writeEarlyHints/writeProcessing, trailers support
- dns: lookup options.all for dual-stack addresses
- crypto: randomInt with rejection sampling for unbiased results
- child_process: AbortSignal support for spawn
- freeze: sanitizeName for valid Zig identifiers (fixes node:events codegen)
- crypto: Transform fallback class for standalone tree-shaking
